problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: If Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration is applied to at, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
